strengths: 15+ years of continuous fullstack development spanning web, backend, mobile, and embedded — far exceeds the 6-year minimum with demonstrated depth in TypeScript and Node.js across multiple production roles
Current role at re:cinq directly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling, precisely matching the job's AI agent development requirement

Exceptionally strong testing culture: practices TDD, authored open-source D-lang testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and delivered public workshops on TDD and functional testing — aligns well with the Vitest/Jest requirement philosophically
concerns: No mention of Nest.js anywhere in the resume — the primary backend framework for this role — leaving uncertainty about hands-on familiarity with its module/DI architecture
Kotlin is absent from the resume; Java appears only in embedded/robotics contexts at Altom, not in production backend services — the secondary stack requirement is essentially unmet
Relational database exposure is thin: PostgreSQL and MySQL are listed as skills but no role description emphasizes production relational DB work; MongoDB dominates the narrative

key_factors.factor: Breadth and seniority of fullstack experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned fullstack engineer whose career trajectory and current work at re:cinq align closely with the role's core demands — particularly around TypeScript/Node.js product engineering and AI agent tooling, which is an explicit and differentiating requirement. His testing discipline is a genuine asset. The main gaps are Nest.js (the specific backend framework) and Kotlin/Java depth for secondary services, both of which represent ramp-up risk but not disqualifying deficiencies given his demonstrated ability to pick up new tools across a polyglot career.
